New Bush Patches for farming: plant a berry bush, watch it grow, and pick berries for Foraging XP plus a first-pick Farming bonus — 16 tiers from Berry Bush up to Astral Berry Bush. Right-click Remove salvages the remaining berries (with a chance at an Apple).

Combat: attack-speed (Tempo) retuned — deep Tempo lines keep adding real attack speed instead of trailing off, while early lines still hit hardest. Glass-cannon builds reach about 6 attacks/sec (~6.7 with Comet).

Fixes: the Acorn Cap cosmetic's shading is corrected, procgen-island fishing pins on the World Map now line up with the real world, and in Classic Layout the night dimming no longer darkens your sidebar/minimap/HUD.
Security & anti-cheat: closed an item-duplication hole and hardened PvP loot and hit detection so cheaters can't dupe or launder items or spoof teleport/dodge hits.

title: Slimetrics Stats Site Fixes
entries: Slimetrics (the stats site) 'Recent Highlights' feed is fixed — it had been stuck for a few days and stopped showing new level-ups. They'll start showing again as players hit level milestones.
Slimetrics is faster and lighter: player profiles, leaderboards and the Server page do a lot less work to load, and pages you've already opened come back instantly.
No in-game changes this update — it's all stats-site improvements.

title: EXP Tracker Rebuilt & Fixes
entries: EXP Tracker rebuilt: a proper bar again — current level on the left, next level on the right, filling as you train (plus a Compact Ring view). XP/hour and 'actions to level' are now accurate — no more giant fake numbers after logging in or alt-tabbing. Renamed 'EXP Tracker (Auto)' in Settings.
Pet Treats now work — feeding one to a slimelet was broken (the button greyed out even with treats in your bag). They also show their proper candy icon now.
AFK timers: Hemp, Flax and all the Lvl 600+ berries now use the full 6-hour gather timer like every other berry; the Lvl 600+ trees get a new 1-hour timer (slow chop, 12 min was too short).
World Map: fishing spots show the right level + a fish icon, every berry has its own icon, and Farm patches now live under a new Farming section.
New 'What's New' button on the login screen — patch notes in-game (this very thing!).
Pet Garden now respects your graphics settings (Potato Mode trims the decorations), runs smoother, and a stale browser tab can no longer wipe your pouch + Pet Treats.
Fixes: removing a farmed tree no longer walks you to spawn; remote players load smoother; fixed rare overlapping trees/rocks on some far islands; new Hide Hover Ring setting.

title: Pet Garden Rework & Polish
entries: Pet Garden "Miscellania" rework: one shared pouch for the whole crew, slimelet levels now boost gather RATE (not bag size), a feeding trough fueled by Tree Meat, and hunger/happiness that actually affects how much they gather.
New Pet Treat (SlimeCoin shop): permanently boosts a slimelet's gather rate and lets well-fed pets look after themselves.
Brand-new Pet Garden scene: fresh terrain, a real river + waterfall, a bouncy diving board, a climbable summit, butterflies and more.
Exclusive fishing spots: some spots now only yield one species — and you can see the fish swimming as a shadow in the water.

EXP Tracker overhaul: cleaner bar that fills toward your next level with the current/next level on each end, plus a Compact Ring view. XP/hour and "actions to level" are now accurate (no more giant fake numbers after logging in or alt-tabbing).
World Map resource list: fishing spots show the right level + a fitting icon, berries got their own icons, and farm patches now live under a Farming section.
New setting: Hide Hover Ring. Redesigned scrolls and staves/wands, two-tone wood log icons, and remade fruit + crop models.

title: Endgame Trees & Skill Tracker
entries: New level 600–1000 woodcutting trees in the PvP Crucible: a high-risk, high-reward treasure-log haul loop.
New top-tier woodcutting frenzy: Enchanted Relic at level 600.
New Skill Tracker HUD chip — right-click a skill to track your progress (now reworked further in v1133).
Fixed a pet garden double-claim issue when a pet's cache was full.

title: World Overhaul & Keybinds
entries: World model overhaul: trees, bushes, rocks and props remodeled across the map.
New Keybinds tab — rebind movement, map, guide, quick-inventory and quick-worn.
New Camera settings tab.
Chat history now replays recent messages when you join, so you don't miss the room.
Mobile tap-through fixes for menus and game controls.
